parameters.jsCode: try{const axios=require('axios');let XLSX;try{XLSX=require('xlsx');}catch(e){XLSX=null;}const BASE='https://atlas.gls-spain.es';const GLS_USER=$env.GLS_USER||'';const GLS_PASS=$env.GLS_PASS||'';if(!GLS_USER||!GLS_PASS)return[{json:{ok:false,error:'Variables GLS_USER o GLS_PASS no configuradas en n8n',envios:[],repartidores:[]}}];const jar={};function sc(h){const v=h['set-cookie']||[];for(const c of(Array.isArray(v)?v:[v])){if(!c)continue;const p=c.split(';')[0].trim();const e=p.indexOf('=');if(e>0)jar[p.substring(0,e).trim()]=p;}}function ch(){return Object.values(jar).join('; ');}async function req(method,url,opts,_rd){_rd=_rd||0;if(_rd>10)throw new Error('Demasiadas redirecciones');const h=(opts||{}).h||{};const body=(opts||{}).body||null;const binary=!!(opts||{}).binary;const hdrs=Object.assign({'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'},h);const ck=ch();if(ck)hdrs['Cookie']=ck;const res=await axios.request({method,url,headers:hdrs,data:body,maxRedirects:0,validateStatus:()=>true,responseType:binary?'arraybuffer':'text'});sc(res.headers);if([301,302,303,307,308].indexOf(res.status)>=0){const loc=res.headers.location;return req([301,302,303].indexOf(res.status)>=0?'GET':method,loc&&loc.startsWith('http')?loc:BASE+loc,{h:h,binary:binary},_rd+1);}if(binary)return{status:res.status,ct:res.headers['content-type']||'',data:Buffer.from(res.data)};return{status:res.status,body:typeof res.data==='string'?res.data:JSON.stringify(res.data)};}function csrf(html){const m=html.match(/name="__RequestVerificationToken"[^>]*value="([^"]+)"/);if(!m)throw new Error('CSRF no encontrado — GLS Atlas puede estar caído o ha cambiado su login');return m[1];}const hoy=new Date();const fmt=d=>String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+'/'+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'/'+d.getFullYear();const fDesde=fmt(new Date(hoy.getFullYear(),hoy.getMonth(),1));const fHasta=fmt(hoy);const r1=await req('GET',BASE+'/Account/Login');const c1=csrf(r1.body);const r2=await req('POST',BASE+'/Account/Login',{h:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded','Referer':BASE+'/Account/Login'},body:'Username='+encodeURIComponent(GLS_USER)+'&Password='+encodeURIComponent(GLS_PASS)+'&__RequestVerificationToken='+encodeURIComponent(c1)});if(r2.body.toLowerCase().includes('name="password"'))return[{json:{ok:false,error:'Login fallido — revisa GLS_USER/GLS_PASS',envios:[],repartidores:[]}}];const r3=await req('GET',BASE+'/delivery/index');if(r3.body.toLowerCase().includes('<title>sign in'))return[{json:{ok:false,error:'Sesión no válida tras login',envios:[],repartidores:[]}}];const c2=csrf(r3.body);const r4=await req('POST',BASE+'/delivery/GetSummarySheets',{h:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded','X-Requested-With':'XMLHttpRequest','Accept':'application/json, text/javascript, */*; q=0.01','Referer':BASE+'/delivery/index'},body:'__RequestVerificationToken='+encodeURIComponent(c2)+'&filters%5Bsince%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fDesde)+'&filters%5Buntil%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fHasta)});let sheetsRaw=r4.body;try{sheetsRaw=JSON.parse(sheetsRaw);}catch(e){}const hojas=((sheetsRaw&&sheetsRaw.Data&&sheetsRaw.Data.List)||[]).filter(s=>s.SheetCode!=null&&s.DealerCode&&s.DealerCode<9000);const repartidores=hojas.map(s=>({nombre:s.Dealer||'Sin nombre',sheetCode:String(s.SheetCode||''),placeCode:String(s.PlaceCode||'')}));const SERVICE_MAP={'10':{label:'10 HORAS',color:'#ef4444',premium:true},'96':{label:'24 HORAS',color:'#10b981',premium:false},'97':{label:'ECONOMY',color:'#6366f1',premium:false},'22':{label:'PARCEL',color:'#f59e0b',premium:false}};const enviosTodos=[];const errores=[];for(const hoja of hojas){try{const rXls=await req('POST',BASE+'/delivery/ExportDeliverySheet',{h:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded','X-Requested-With':'XMLHttpRequest','Referer':BASE+'/delivery/index'},body:'__RequestVerificationToken='+encodeURIComponent(c2)+'&sheetCode='+encodeURIComponent(String(hoja.SheetCode))+'&placeCode='+encodeURIComponent(String(hoja.PlaceCode))+'&filters%5Bsince%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fDesde)+'&filters%5Buntil%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fHasta),binary:true});const ct=(rXls.ct||'').toLowerCase();const isXls=ct.includes('spreadsheet')||ct.includes('excel')||ct.includes('openxmlformats')||ct.includes('octet-stream');if(rXls.status===200&&isXls&&XLSX&&rXls.data&&rXls.data.length>100){const wb=XLSX.read(rXls.data,{type:'buffer'});const ws=wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{defval:''});for(const row of rows){const k={};for(const key of Object.keys(row)){const norm=key.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'').normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'');k[norm]=row[key];}const codexp=String(k['codexp']||k['codigoenvio']||k['nenvio']||k['expedicion']||'').trim();if(!codexp)continue;const srvCode=String(k['servicio']||k['codservicio']||k['tiposervicio']||'96');const srv=SERVICE_MAP[srvCode]||{label:'24 HORAS',color:'#10b981',premium:false};enviosTodos.push({id:codexp,conductor:hoja.Dealer,cliente:String(k['destinatario']||k['cliente']||''),direccion:String(k['direccion']||k['domicilio']||''),localidad:String(k['localidad']||k['poblacion']||''),cp:String(k['cp']||k['codigopostal']||String(hoja.PlaceCode)||''),estado:parseInt(k['estado']||k['eventococigo']||6)||6,bultos:parseInt(k['bultos']||1)||1,kgs:parseFloat(k['kgs']||k['peso']||0)||0,fPrevista:String(k['fprevista']||k['fechaprevista']||fmt(hoy)),srvCode:srvCode,srvLabel:srv.label,srvColor:srv.color,isPremium:srv.premium,nota:String(k['nota']||k['observaciones']||''),tieneNota:!!(k['nota']||k['observaciones'])});}}else{const rJ=await req('POST',BASE+'/delivery/GetDeliveryItems',{h:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded','X-Requested-With':'XMLHttpRequest','Accept':'application/json, text/javascript, */*; q=0.01','Referer':BASE+'/delivery/index'},body:'__RequestVerificationToken='+encodeURIComponent(c2)+'&sheetCode='+encodeURIComponent(String(hoja.SheetCode))+'&placeCode='+encodeURIComponent(String(hoja.PlaceCode))+'&filters%5Bsince%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fDesde)+'&filters%5Buntil%5D='+encodeURIComponent(fHasta)});let jRaw=rJ.body;try{jRaw=JSON.parse(jRaw);}catch(e){}const items=(jRaw&&jRaw.Data&&jRaw.Data.List)||(Array.isArray(jRaw)?jRaw:[]);for(const i of items){const srvCode=String(i.srvCode||i.ServCode||i.CodServicio||i.ServiceCode||'96');const srv=SERVICE_MAP[srvCode]||{label:'24 HORAS',color:'#10b981',premium:false};enviosTodos.push({id:String(i.codexp||i.CodExp||i.Codexp||i.Id||''),conductor:hoja.Dealer,cliente:String(i.destinatario||i.Destinatario||''),direccion:String(i.direccion||i.Direccion||''),localidad:String(i.localidad||i.Localidad||''),cp:String(i.cp||i.CP||String(hoja.PlaceCode)||''),estado:parseInt(i.eventoCodigo||i.EventoCodigo||i.Status||6)||6,bultos:parseInt(i.bultos||i.Bultos||1)||1,kgs:parseFloat(i.kgs||i.Kgs||0)||0,fPrevista:String(i.fPrevista||i.FPrevista||fmt(hoy)),srvCode:srvCode,srvLabel:srv.label,srvColor:srv.color,isPremium:srv.premium,nota:String(i.nota||i.Nota||''),tieneNota:!!(i.nota||i.Nota)});}if(rXls.status!==200)errores.push({sheetCode:hoja.SheetCode,dealer:hoja.Dealer,info:'Excel HTTP '+rXls.status+', JSON fallback, items: '+items.length});}}catch(e){errores.push({sheetCode:hoja.SheetCode,dealer:hoja.Dealer,error:e.message});}}return [{json:{ok:true,repartidores,envios:enviosTodos,hojas:hojas.length,errores,_debug:{totalHojas:hojas.length,totalEnvios:enviosTodos.length,xlsxAvailable:!!XLSX}}}];}catch(e){return[{json:{ok:false,error:e.message,stack:e.stack?e.stack.split('\n').slice(0,5).join(' | '):'',envios:[],repartidores:[]}}];}
